data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the verification timeline.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a verification timeline (pending/verified/rejected/revoked), but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement. The prior steps do not address the verification timeline, leading to an inconclusive result regarding its coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or status of the verification timeline.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for verification timeline
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the verification timeline requirement.
